title: datetime.utcnow() is deprecated (Python 3.12+)
evidence: app.py:32-34 uses datetime.utcnow as default/onupdate for created_at and updated_at; emits DeprecationWarning on 3.12+
suggestion: Use lambda: datetime.now(datetime.UTC) or a timezone-aware default

title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: run dir has no requirements.txt or pyproject.toml; deps only listed prose-style in README.md:45-49
suggestion: Add requirements.txt pinning flask, flask-sqlalchemy, pytest for reproducible installs

title: Timestamps and year coercion beyond spec
evidence: app.py:32-34 adds created_at/updated_at; app.py:82-86 coerces year to int with 400 on failure
suggestion: None — reasonable enhancements over the minimal spec
